name: Hamburger Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 pound venison or ground beef, ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef or ground venison.
2. Add the onion soup and Worcestershire sauce to the meat mixture.
3. Mix in the vegetable soup and sour cream.
4. Pour the mixture into a baking dish.
5. Cover with refrigerated biscuits.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 15 minutes, or until the biscuits are browned.
Note: You may use a Bisquick biscuit recipe instead of refrigerated biscuits.
